_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Iyabika i kaluguran, at lumubus.
speakFriend.description: Ing Liana Banyan ginagawa para magbukas para king balang amanu. Balang bukas a amanu atin yang metung a gantimpala ning salin.
speakFriend.marksAwarded: Marks a binie (mga token ning pakiamping)
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Ing listang amanu at mga rate ning Marks pansamantala. Ang Marks mga token ning pakiamping, e equity.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Isalin ing Liana Banyan king {{language}}. Kumita ning {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeWelcome: Mga screen ning Mabusing Piyabia / Ghost World
speakFriend.scopeCueCards: Core a set ning Cue Card
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Mga label ning navigasyon at mensahe ning sala
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Abak a amanu -- e mengailangan gantimpala.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Tinig ning Tagpamagal: Bakit Ini Deng Adwa
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Balang termino iti sinabyan ya ngeni ya rason. Ugatan deng 26 mas mahalaga a ngaran.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Paanu Magobra Deng Gantimpala ning Salin
speakFriend.step1Body: Bukasan ing Gantimpala ning Salin ibat Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Isalin deng lang-langauang string. Isubmit king Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Pagka tanggap, makatanggap kang Marks at mairekord sa IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Sabian amiku, malukluk ka."

languageSwitcher.tip: Gamitin deng iba-ibang password amanu king Pintuan ni Durin para ma-unlock deng natatanging karanasan!
